response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong engineering leadership and distributed systems expertise, with experience in event-driven platforms (e.g., GISCollective) and AI-agent infrastructure (re:cinq). However, his lack of direct fintech, agentic-AI production systems in regulated environments, and AI-native fintech integration experience significantly weakens his fit for this role. His recent work leans toward full-stack development and tooling rather than executive-scale AI system design.
strengths: Strong distributed-systems and event-driven architecture experience (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby media)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure contributions (MCP, agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and implementing disciplined practices (TD, CI/CD at RIDE Capital)
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in fintech or regulated environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure familiarity (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance)
Lack of executive-scale leadership (e.g., scaling teams from 10 to 30+, governance frameworks, board communication)

key_factors.factor: AI-agent production experience in fintech/regulated environments
